name: per_section_request_triggers_series_mode
input: Here is my 5-section blog post. Create an illustration for each section plus a cover.
expect: Series mode activates: per-section distillation, image plan, manifest. Not a single merged image.

name: single_image_request_stays_single
input: Create one sketchnote summarizing this long article.
expect: Series mode does not activate. One image generated from global distillation.

name: one_style_locked_across_body_set
expect: All body illustrations use one style code. Only the cover may differ (WEC per cover-spec).

name: palette_and_style_paragraph_identical
expect: Every prompt in the set names the same exact hues and repeats the same style paragraph verbatim.

name: plan_shown_before_generation
input: A 6-section article requesting a series, without saying 'generate everything now'.
expect: The image plan (number, role, section, labels, filename) is presented before generating.

name: set_capped_at_eight_with_merge_note
input: A 12-section article requesting one illustration per section.
expect: Plan caps at 8 images total, merges weakest sections, and notes the merge.

name: manifest_returned_with_set
expect: A manifest is returned: series slug, style, cover_style, palette, aspect 16:9, and one entry per image with labels.

name: one_backend_per_series
input: A series where the primary backend fails midway.
expect: The skill does not silently mix backends: it regenerates the set on the fallback or warns about style drift.
